target: 31. The Fourth Funeral ~ Interrogation

(1:30.
The coffin of Ushio is placed in the furnace)

(An hour until the remains are collected…
It's lunchtime for everyone)

(This is the perfect opportunity to gather information.
I'll ask two questions to someone I'm curious about)

(The first is whether they know about the Shadow Sickness…
The second is whether they've seen a woman with a large chest…)
(Who should I talk to…)
Ask Totsumura
Ask Alan
Ask Karikiri
Ask Hishigata

Totsumura-san.
Have you heard of the Shadow Sickness?

Ah~ I've heard of it~!
It's a ghost story from Hitogashima Island!
I was scared of it as a kid~!

They say misbehaving kids
get eaten by shadows~
…Do you think shadows actually exist?

What?
No way! It's just superstition!
There's no way something like that actually exists!!
I see… Well, can I ask one more thing?
Huh?

Um… She was wearing glasses…
I don't know how to say it… A woman with a large chest?
Ahhhh!! I saw her!! I talked to her!!

She seemed dangerous! She suddenly opened
the coffin of Ushio~!

But she was beautiful!!
She had a huge chest!
A G-cup! G!!

Real G!! Have you seen it??
It was wild! So exciting!!
U-um… Do you have her contact info…?

No way!!
I tried to chase her but she ran away!!
I should've taken a photo~!!

Huh… I see…
Thank you very much…

Alan.
Have you heard of the Shadow Sickness?
Shadows…?

Ah… I think I've heard something like that
from Konoko before…

(Konoko…
The mother of Ushio and Mio…)

That's a doppelgänger, right?
It's a well-known story in France!
There's a woman named Emily Sagou…
Did Ushio ever tell you about this?
Ushio??

No…?
I don't think I've heard about shadows…

I see…
Hey, I have one more question.
What?

She had glasses, black hair… like…
a model
with a great figure?

Glasses… black hair… model…?
Ah, it's Hizuru!

…!
Do you know her?

Yeah… she came here too.
She used to come here often.
She was a regular.
Huh. Really?

Yeah. She left the island a while back,
so you probably don't remember her.
She left the island…?

Yeah, when she was a middle schooler.
It was… a bit of a mess.
She never came back to the island.

(If he's being vague, it's probably something
difficult to talk about.
I shouldn't push further)

So she's back for a visit now.
Did Alan contact her?

Me? No no!
I don't even know her contact info.
She came here for work, I think…
Work?
She said she's a writer in Tokyo.
I see… Thank you.

Karikiri.
Have you heard of the Shadow Sickness?

What do you mean "have you heard"?
I named it after my great-grandfather.

Wha!?
That's how it started?!

Yes… in the late Edo period.
Back then, everything was blamed on yokai…

Up until my grandfather's time, they even
did exorcisms at the shrine…

Huh…
By the way, what's the cure?

Cure?!
Hmm… I'm not sure…
Have you ever done it yourself?

No, I haven't…
I do regular exorcisms though…

Ah! By the way, Shinpei.
How's Tokyo?

Actually, I went there last year!
You know that place near the sea…

(No good, he'll talk forever if I don't cut in!
I need to push the conversation!)

Um, one more thing?
A woman with glasses, black hair… with a big chest…
Have you seen her?

Hm…!
Is that Hizuru?
Hizuru Minakata!
Umm… Is she still around?
(Though I don't see her around…)

<color=#GF_TIPS_119>Dr. Hishigata</color>.
I have a question…
Are you free now?
Ah, you… What do you want?

I know it's odd to ask a doctor this,
but… Have you heard of the Shadow Sickness?

Ah… I know about it.
It's a type of "mental illness"
that occurred in groups on this island.
So there are records of it?
Yeah, I still have old charts.

It's called Capgras syndrome…
People think their friends or family
have been replaced by identical impostors…

…!!
By the way, have you treated anyone?

Me?!
No way!
It was from the early Showa period.
I've never treated such cases.

I see… Oh, one more thing.
Do you know a woman with glasses and black hair?

She seems to be from outside the island.
I don't know how to say it… She's very well-built…

…Maybe that woman from earlier?
I don't know her…

Alan said she's a friend…
But I don't know anyone who'd open a coffin.

Huh…?
Why would she open the coffin…?

Who cares?!
She's a reckless woman! Honestly…
I see… That's right…

(Well, I've gathered everything…
Let me sort it out)

(Most attendees knew about the Shadow Sickness.
But they all said it was just superstition or ghost stories)
(They all think the "shadow" is just a monster)
(The interesting part is Karikiri's and Dr. Hishigata's answers)

(If their stories are true, the "shadow" has existed
on this island since the Edo period, and was often
sighted until before the war…)

(And the "old charts" at Hishigata Clinic…
It's worth investigating)

(Most importantly…
It's surprising that so many people
knew about the "woman with glasses"!!)

(The local, Hizuru Minakata…
She's probably the real name of Nagumo-sensei!)

(Since Nagumo is a pseudonym, no one knows
that Nagumo-sensei = Hizuru Minakata!)

(Plus, she was a regular at Koba Mart…
What a close call!!)
